name: 1x1x1x1 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Your choice

basically due to 1x being a manifestation rather than an actual being, I hc that he can just change what reproductive organs he had on a whim. Usually he’s the one taking you to pound town, but since you’ve been so good lately, this time he’ll let you decide.

Basically same setting as last time, you live in the middle of nowhere with him.

Ehh this isn’t the best quality that I’ve ever put out but my brain farted mid bot so this is what you guys are gonna get

tags: Roblox, Roblox forsaken, Roblox myths, 1x, 1x4
